risk_description: A user who creates and confirms production orders can fabricate production output records

A user who can cancel and finalize confirmations can manipulate production output records
A user who can mass change and confirm production orders can alter large volumes of production data
A user who records quality results and makes usage decisions can pass defective materials
A user who modifies quality results and changes disposition can falsify quality data

rule_name: Create Inspection Lot and Usage Decision
risk_description: A user who creates inspection lots and makes usage decisions controls the entire quality gate
A user who creates quality notifications and makes disposition decisions can suppress defect reporting

rule_name: Create Inspection Plan and Record Results
risk_description: A user who designs inspection plans and records results can set easy pass criteria
A user who creates maintenance orders and receives goods can order and receive materials for personal use

rule_name: Change Equipment and Create Maint Order
risk_description: A user who modifies equipment data and creates maintenance can manipulate maintenance schedules

rule_name: Mass Change Maint Orders and Confirm
risk_description: A user who mass changes and confirms maintenance can bulk-manipulate maintenance records
A user who creates purchase orders and receives goods can procure and receive without independent verification
A user who modifies purchase orders and posts goods receipts can alter PO terms and receipt quantities
A user who creates vendors and purchase orders can establish fictitious vendors and place orders with them
A user who creates vendors and posts invoices can create fictitious vendors and submit false invoices
A user who posts invoices and runs payments can submit and pay fraudulent invoices
A user who creates vendors and executes payments can set up and pay fictitious vendors
A user who confirms receipt and posts invoices can confirm receipt of undelivered goods and process payment
A user who auto-creates POs and receives goods can generate and receive orders without review
A user who creates materials and purchase orders can add materials and immediately procure them
A user who changes material data and creates cost estimates can manipulate product costs
A user who creates cost estimates and updates prices controls the entire costing process
A user who posts GL entries and vendor invoices can manipulate both sides of financial records
A user who posts GL entries and runs payments can create journal entries and disburse funds

rule_name: Mass GL Changes and GL Posting
risk_description: A user who can mass reverse and post GL entries can hide fraudulent transactions

rule_name: Cost Center Create and Plan Change
risk_description: A user who creates cost centers and modifies plans can create cost centers with inflated budgets
A user who enters counts and posts adjustments can manipulate inventory levels

rule_name: Create Physical Inventory and Post Diff
risk_description: A user who initiates counts and posts differences can selectively count and adjust to hide shrinkage
A user who creates BOMs and routings controls the entire product structure and process definition
A user who creates BOMs and cost estimates can manipulate material composition and product cost
A user who creates work centers and routings can define production capacity and process steps
A user who creates transfer orders and goods issues can move and issue inventory without oversight
A user who creates transfers and counts inventory can move stock and falsify count results
A user who maintains user accounts and manages transports can grant access and deploy unauthorized changes
A user who develops code and manages transports can write and deploy malicious programs
A user who manages user accounts and posts GL entries can create accounts with financial posting access
A user who maintains HR data and work schedules can create phantom employees with scheduled hours
A user who receives goods and transfers stock can receive and relocate materials without oversight
A user who creates deliveries and issues goods controls the entire outbound process
A user who creates shipments and deliveries controls the transportation and delivery chain
A user who creates requisitions and purchase orders can self-approve procurement

rule_name: Change Purchase Req and Auto PO
risk_description: A user who modifies requisitions and auto-generates POs can alter requirements and auto-procure
A user who confirms production and makes quality decisions controls both output and quality approval
A user who creates EHS incidents and quality notifications may create duplicates or suppress one type
A user who creates equipment and functional locations controls the entire asset structure
A user who modifies maintenance plans and equipment can alter maintenance schedules and asset data
A user who performs goods movements and views stock has full visibility into inventory operations
A user who creates POs and assigns requisitions can route requisitions to preferred vendors
A user who creates substance records and generates reports can manipulate compliance data
A user who triggers inspections and changes lots controls the quality audit process
A user who creates cycle counts and posts differences can manipulate ongoing inventory accuracy
A user who creates production orders and receives goods can fabricate material receipts
A user who modifies vendors and creates POs can redirect orders to altered vendor accounts
A user who modifies vendor bank details and runs payments can redirect payments

rule_name: GL Posting and Cost Center Change
risk_description: A user who posts GL entries and changes cost centers can post to and then modify cost center structures
